content.en:
"The second wave of attacks of the Supreme Dao Void Demon is coming, and this time the attack is even more violent!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Node Six.

A replica body of Ye Tian is hidden here, and on the surface, the person in charge here is a powerhouse in the early stage of the Eightfold Dao Realm, but in fact, the person in charge is him.

It's just that the other Dao realms don't know.

"It's coming!"

The dense Supreme Dao Void Demon led an endless stream of Supreme Dao Demons to pour in, and its scale was incomparably huge.

"Two Eightfold Supreme Dao Void Demon !!!"

Those Sevenfold Dao Realms at this node panicked and began to ask for help.

After all, there is only one Eightfold Dao Realm at this node, can they stop it?

"Stop these Pathway Monsters!"

Node Six's Eightfold Dao Realm commanded.

He didn't panic, because he knew that Ye Tian was here, although he hadn't seen Ye Tian make a move, but Ye Tian was able to kill the Eightfold Dao Void Demon, and his strength would definitely be stronger than him, what was he panicking about?

After the ordinary Dao Realm slashed those Dao monsters, countless blood-colored silk threads wrapped around those three or four Dao Realms.

This will obviously be a new move for the Dao Void Demon to study.

In an instant, many of the Triple Dao Realms were seriously injured, and even many of the Quadruple Dao Realms were entangled in blood-colored silk threads, resulting in the inability to exert their strength.

"It's the power of the curse!"

The Seven Realms have all seen that the power of this curse is not terrible, but the key is to affect combat effectiveness, and now it is a war, there is no time to expel the curse, and they have not prepared the corresponding healing thing.

Rumble!!!!!!

The Supreme Dao Void Demon side is starting a large-scale invasion, preparing to take out these three or four Supreme Dao realms.

"Attack!"

The Eightfold Dao Realm commanded.

In an instant, the two sides collided.

At this moment, two Eightfold Supreme Dao Void Demons besieged this Eightfold Dao Realm at the sixth node.

These two Eightfold Supreme Dao Void Demons, one is in the middle of the Eightfold Path Realm, and the other is in the late stage of the Eightfold Pathway Realm, and their strength is above that of this Winter Night Fortress, the Eightfold Highest Dao Realm.

Just when they thought they could kill the Winter Night Fortress Eight to the Dao Realm, Ye Tian suddenly made a move.

"Kill!"

The fifth sequence of the Supreme Dao rules is integrated into the Supreme Dao Spear Technique.

Poof!

The Eight Patterns Supreme Dao Weapon Spear pierced through one of the Eight Supreme Dao Void Demons, killing him instantly.

"Not good!"

The other Eightfold Supreme Dao Void Demon was terrified and wanted to escape, but it was too late.

Burst!

The body was pierced, directly shattered, and killed on the spot.

Killing two Eightfold Supreme Dao Void Demons in two moves made this Eightfold Supreme Dao Realm stunned, and the other Sevenfold Supreme Dao Realms were also shocked.

Puff puff puff!!!

The sixth sequence of Supreme Dao rules turned into silk threads, penetrating the body of a Sevenfold Supreme Dao Void Demon, killing them as well.

In the blink of an eye, all the powerhouses on the side of the Supreme Dao Void Demon were wiped out, leaving only the sixfold Supreme Dao Void Demon and the weaker Supreme Dao Void Demon.

"The rest of the Supreme Dao Void Demons, you deal with it, I'll go support the other nodes!"

Ye Tian said.

Immediately, he quickly left.

And at other nodes.

Ye Tian's copy body burst out one after another, killing one by one the seventh-fold Supreme Dao Void Demons and the eighth-fold Supreme Dao Void Demons.

In a short period of time, the Void Demon side of the Dao suffered heavy losses.

......

Node Nine.

Ye Tian looked at the mid-sevenfold mid-stage Void Demon in front of him, revealing a look of surprise.

This person turned out to be a descendant of the Heavenly Blood First Lineage with a supreme bloodline, exuding the Sixth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules of the Seventy Percent Realm.

It can be said that this person's strength can be called invincible in the Eightfold Dao Realm.

He originally thought that the other party was an ordinary sevenfold supreme dao realm, and wanted to use the sixth sequence of the supreme dao rule silk thread to instantly kill the other party, but he was crushed by the other party casually.

Judging from the results of the snooping of the copy talent, this supreme path void demon is named Blood Crouch.

"The strongest genius of the Innate Origin Realm who walks the strongest to the Dao, it's a pity that you are only the sixth to the Dao realm, otherwise you are really qualified to compete with me!"

The blood crouch killed Ye Tian.

But Ye Tian was not afraid at all.

In terms of cultivation, he was indeed inferior to the other party, and his physical fitness, strength, and speed were also inferior, but he had comprehended the Fifth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules, and that was enough.

Bang!!!!

Relying on the rules of the fifth sequence to the Dao, Ye Tian fought with this bloody wrestler.

"Fifth Sequence of Solstice Rule !!!"

The blood crouch was shocked.

A sixfold supreme Dao realm comprehends the rules of the fifth sequence of supreme dao, what kind of demon is this!

The two sides fought for a long time, but they did not distinguish the winner.

Ye Tian didn't let other replica bodies come to support, and even if he came, there was a high probability that he wouldn't be able to keep the blood.

The Supreme Dao Void Demon must attach great importance to the clansmen of the strongest bloodline, and there are a lot of life-saving things, and it is too difficult to kill him.

Therefore, his replica body can drag the other party.

Time passes slowly.

After a long time, the Bloody Crouch seemed to have received a notice to retreat and immediately withdrew.

And Ye Tian did not chase and kill the blood crouch, but chased and killed those sevenfold supreme Dao void demons and killed them one by one.

This time, the Supreme Dao Blood Demon side can be described as a great rout, and a large number of Supreme Dao Void Demons were killed and stayed here forever.

After the Supreme Blood Demon completely escaped, the Supreme Dao Realm of the Winter Night Fortress began to clean up the battlefield.

......

Winter Night's Fortress.

Ye Tian and the other domain masters all returned.

Ye Tian found that the owner was injured, and the injury was not light.

"Stopper, are you hurt?"

Ye Tian was surprised.

The Plug Lord Xing Ling is a nine-fold Dao realm, and he was not lightly injured.

The Sai Lord said: "I encountered an Eightfold Supreme Dao Void Demon with the strongest bloodline, and I was injured by him! If it weren't for the Su Domain Lord coming to the rescue, I guess I would have died!"

The Eightfold Dao Void Demon of the Supreme Bloodline can easily fight beyond the ranks, and Xingling is already very lucky that he was not killed by it.

The Su Domain Lord said: "This time, thanks to the Ye Domain Lord, your clone has continuously supported the major nodes, killing a lot of Eightfold Supreme Dao Void Demons and Sevenfold Supreme Dao Void Demons, such a loss makes those Supreme Dao Void Demon high-level feel unbearable, so they retreat, otherwise we may fall a Domain Lord again this time!"

"It's my job!"

Ye Tiandao.

Shortly thereafter, the Innate Origin Alliance issued an announcement.

In this wave of attacks, the Innate Origin Alliance lost two fortresses.

Moreover, there are also many official members of the Innate Origin Domain Alliance who have fallen, and the list has been announced in the Supreme Void, so that many official members have a heavy heart after seeing it.

"In this wave of attacks, thirty-six Ninefold Dao Realm people have fallen, and there is also one Eightfold Dao Realm who has taken the path of the strongest Dao Realm!!"

Ye Tian was extremely surprised.

This must not be an ordinary battlefield like the Winter Night Fortress, but a top-level battlefield that he can hardly imagine.

It is estimated that there are nine realms everywhere, and the fighting is extremely tragic.
